title: Preorders for Samsung’s new Z Fold and Flip 8 come with up to $350 in gift cards
summary: At Galaxy Unpacked, the company announced the Galaxy Z Flip 8, Galaxy Z Fold 8, and Galaxy Z Fold 8 Ultra. If you’re after Samsung’s most capable foldable, the Galaxy Z Fold 8 Ultra is the one to preorder.
